zh.Kaatsheuvel, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-布拉班特卡阿維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede是Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen和Aleida Jansdr van Altena的兒子，於1110年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德道德雷特。他於大約1149年與Adelheid van Voorne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1172年在荷蘭霍蘭道德雷特享年63歲。

zh-hans.Kaatsheuvel, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: 荷兰努-布拉班特卡阿維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede是Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen和Aleida Jansdr van Altena的儿子，于1110年出生在荷兰-拉藍德道德雷特。他于大约1149年与Adelheid van Voorne结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1172年在荷兰霍蘭道德雷特享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Daniël
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

variants.name: Danyal
meanings: Fanciful respelling of   Daniel .

en.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede was born in 1110, in Dordrecht, South Holland, Netherlands as the son of Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen and Aleida Jansdr van Altena. He married Adelheid van Voorne about 1149. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1172, in Dordrecht, Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede est né en 1110, à Dordrecht, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, fils de Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen et Aleida Jansdr van Altena. Il a épousé Adelheid van Voorne environ 1149. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1172, à Dordrecht, Holland, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede wurde 1110 in Dordrecht, Südholland, Niederlande, als Sohn von Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen und Aleida Jansdr van Altena geboren. Er hat um 1149 Adelheid van Voorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1172 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Dordrecht, Holland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede è nato il nel 1110 nel Dordrecht, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi come figlio di Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen e Aleida Jansdr van Altena. Lui sposato Adelheid van Voorne circa 1149. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1172, nel Dordrecht, Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Dordrecht, South Holland The Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドドールドレチト
ja.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwedeは1110年にオランダズイド-hオランドドールドレチトでSijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van TeijlingenとAleida Jansdr van Altenaの息子として生まれた。約1149年にAdelheid van Voorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1172年にオランダホーランドドールドレチトで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede(은)는 1110년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 도르드레ch트에서 Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen(와)과 Aleida Jansdr van Altena의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1149년 Adelheid van Voorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1172년 네덜란드 홀랜드 도르드레ch트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Kaatsheuvel, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: Kaatsheuvel, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede nasceu em 1110, em Dordrecht, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos filho de Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen e Aleida Jansdr van Altena. Ele casou-se com Adelheid van Voorne aproximadamente 1149. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1172, em Dordrecht, Holland, Países Baixos, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede родился в 1110 г. в местности дордречт, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. Его родителей звали Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen и Aleida Jansdr van Altena. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid van Voorne около 1149 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1172 г. в местности дордречт, холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 63 лет.

es.Kaatsheuvel, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: Kaatsheuvel, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede nació en 1110, en Dordrecht, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos como hijo de Sijmon Sifridsz van Brederode van Teijlingen y Aleida Jansdr van Altena. Se casó con Adelheid van Voorne aproximadamente 1149. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1172, en Dordrecht, Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 63 años.
